rationale: The cited paper is not just listed as background; it is used as a methodological precedent throughout the meta-analysis design. The citing study explicitly follows prior elasticity meta-analyses including Bijmolt et al. (2005) in specifying determinants, coding variables (Table 1 precedence entries), and modeling/reporting choices. It also benchmarks its model fit and some interpretation practices against Bijmolt et al. (2005), indicating a meaningful functional role in how the new study is executed.
relation_description: The citing paper transfers the meta-analytic framework used in Bijmolt et al. (2005) on price elasticity to a new domain, personal selling elasticity. It adapts that prior determinant-and-method template as an empirical generalization approach for a different marketing instrument.
